title: Github integration in Work management
excerpt:
Is it possible to use the Github integration for Monday dev in Work management? 
I don’t really understand why we pay almost the same price for a product that is basicly the same but don’t get the same inegrations?

posts.author: maarten1055 (Maarten Geelen)
